# Transcrição: 11-What Is a Course Creator

- **Fonte:** 11-What Is a Course Creator
- **Duração:** 01:23
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:23]

What is a course creator? To state the obvious, our mastermind business program is a course. Through a series of pre-recorded video instructions, in-depth workbooks and worksheets, and a group for support, you're learning the skills, strategies, and tools you need to build and scale your knowledge-based business. If you choose the course creator path, then you too will build a powerful step-by-step program to help your clients achieve their goals. As a course creator, you're responsible for creating an easy-to-follow system that your clients can implement on their own without additional support, customization, or personalization from you. The course creator path is an excellent option if you can clearly communicate in writing and or through video. Course creators also deeply understand the challenges their clients face and know the tools and strategies to help them. Plus, they have a strong attention to detail since you have to provide everything your ideal audience needs inside the course. Becoming a course creator might be challenging if you prefer working directly with people in a more collaborative and personal way, either one-on-one or in small groups. It also might be tough if you don't want to write, record, and deliver a material in a very structured way. However, if you want to give everything, all the stories, teachings, and tools that your ideal audience needs so they can reach their goals on their own, then consider choosing the course creator path.
